# Taha Note

> Taha Note (https://tahanote.com) is a cloud-based web app for writing, organizing, studying, and syncing personal notes.

## About

Taha Note helps students and professionals capture ideas, study efficiently, and stay organized. The app supports Swedish and English and runs entirely in the browser at tahanote.com.

Created by Abdullah Taha.

## Key Features

- Rich-text notes with formatting, colours, tables, and images
- Cloud sync so notes are available across devices
- Favourites, archive, trash, and note library
- Quiz creation and practice from your notes
- Secure file uploads (up to 20 MB per file)
- Dark mode
- Swedish (SV) and English (EN) interface

## Main Pages

- Home: https://tahanote.com/
- Notes library: https://tahanote.com/library
- File uploads: https://tahanote.com/files
- Quiz: https://tahanote.com/quiz
- Notes to study: https://tahanote.com/unread
- Studied notes: https://tahanote.com/read
- Favourites: https://tahanote.com/favorites
- Archive: https://tahanote.com/archive
